title: Railman Villager
description: This mod adds a Railman Villager profession that has many unique rail trades !
body:
The Railman Villager has a regular anvil as a proffesion block. It has various trades that make getting rails and its variants easier to get.

Perfect for big rail stations and roads.

If you want to make a big rollercoaster in your world, use this mod to make it easier to make.
